# Pigment analysis using spectrophotometer

## Short Teaching Summary
Pigment analysis using spectrophotometer: A spectrophotometer can be used to determine the types of pigments present by generating absorption spectra. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
